title: carex subtilis
intro: Carex subtilis, also known as the lesser tussock sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of the world. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Carex subtilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an expectorant, and even help to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
